updates.title: Freezing / performance fix
updates.notes: Fixes the app freezing. A background cloud-sync was accidentally re-triggering itself every 3 seconds, re-uploading all your data over and over and locking up the screen. Sync now runs only when something has actually changed, never while you are filling in a form, and the first sync after login is delayed so the app is usable immediately. Also caps the internal activity log so the app stays fast over time.

updates.title: Document polish
updates.notes: Three refinements to the generated documents: the 'TAX INVOICE / FEE NOTE' style heading at the top-right is now a smaller, brand-coloured size instead of oversized; the 'Amount' column heading is right-aligned so it sits exactly above its values; and the gold accent lines in the letterhead are thinner and more subtle. Applies to fee notes, receipts, quotes and statements.

updates.title: Premium document redesign
updates.notes: Fee notes, receipts, quotes and statements have been redesigned to look more professional. The firm name at the top no longer overlaps the document title, oversized text has been toned down, and the fee tables now have clean aligned columns with clear hairline rows. Totals are shown in a single elegant block (Subtotal, Total, Paid, Balance due). No data changes.

updates.title: Sign-in fix (critical)
updates.notes: Fixes sign-in, which was broken since v2.4.5: the application code inside the app was accidentally truncated during that release, so the sign-in button did nothing. The full code has been restored (and verified against the last known-good version). Includes the new clean white theme from v2.5.0. Please install this update.

updates.title: All-new clean white theme
updates.notes: A complete visual refresh inspired by the design of X: crisp white surfaces with hairline dividers, bold black headings, rounded pill buttons with a single blue accent, soft grey stat tiles, pill navigation in the sidebar, and a minimal white sign-in screen. Purely visual — no data or workflow changes. (Also repairs the update feed, which was malformed since v2.4.5.)

updates.title: Cleaner header & toned-down colours
updates.notes: UI refinements to the header and navigation: the crest icon has been removed for a cleaner look, the header is now a flat dark navy instead of a multi-stop gradient, the gold shimmer on the 'Bill' wordmark is replaced with a calm solid gold, primary action buttons throughout the app are now a consistent navy instead of the gold gradient, the active tab indicator is a flat navy underline instead of a glowing gold bar, and the account avatar is a quiet frosted circle. No data changes — install by double-clicking the installer.

updates.title: Design polish
updates.notes: Fixes the last rough edges of the new minimalist look: the dropdown arrow no longer tiles across the field (the row of chevron marks is gone), the header and login logo are now a terracotta scale mark that matches the theme instead of the old navy icon, and the Trust and VAT total cards are now clean white cards with the amount in terracotta instead of a heavy dark-brown block. Install by double-clicking the installer; your data is untouched.

updates.title: Fix startup crash + refined minimalist design
updates.notes: Fixes a 'JavaScript error occurred in the main process' crash on launch by loading the email module only when it is actually used, so a missing component can no longer stop the app from starting. Also a proper, cohesive pass on the new minimalist look: warm paper background, charcoal text and a single terracotta accent applied consistently to the header, sidebar, cards, stat tiles, buttons, chips, tables, segmented controls, inputs, modals and the login screen (the earlier version left several components with the old colours). Includes the restored sign-in code. Install this once by double-clicking the installer; your data is untouched.

updates.title: New minimalist design + sign-in fix
updates.notes: A clean, minimalist redesign: a warm paper background, charcoal text, a single muted terracotta accent, hairline borders and flat surfaces (no more heavy gradients, glows or glass blur) — across the whole app and the login screen. This release also restores the sign-in code that versions 2.3.0/2.3.1 accidentally dropped (they could not log in), and keeps the reorganised navigation (each Settings function in its own tab; Settings renamed Configuration settings) and the reliable update downloader. If you are stuck on the login screen, install this once by double-clicking the installer; your data is untouched.

updates.title: Reliable in-app update downloads
updates.notes: Fixes the in-app updater so downloads no longer freeze part-way (for example, stuck at 52%). A stalled download now times out cleanly, shows a clear message, and offers a one-click 'Download in your browser instead' option. Includes everything from 2.3.0: each Settings function has its own tab (Cost estimates, Receipts, Firm details, Billing settings, Court fee tariffs, User management, My account) and the Settings tab is renamed Configuration settings.

updates.title: Reorganised navigation — a tab for each area
updates.notes: The Settings area has been split up so each function has its own tab: Cost estimates, Receipts, Firm details, Billing settings, Court fee tariffs, User management and My account are now separate tabs in the sidebar. The old PDF-report shortcut was removed (client statements are still available from a client's page), and the remaining Settings tab is renamed Configuration settings. Firm details, Billing settings, Court fee tariffs, User management and Configuration settings stay administrator-only.

updates.title: Matters tab + reliable updates + full tariffs
updates.notes: New Matters tab to create and manage matters (High Court / Magistrate / Miscellaneous) with an automatic firm reference, a later court case number, court name(s) and applicant/respondent names that auto-fill the Bill of Costs; miscellaneous matters have no case number and everything is editable any time. Update detection now reads the real installed version and always fetches the latest manifest; existing installs receive the complete High Court (33) and Magistrate (148) gazette tariff lists via a one-time migration that keeps edited rates; and internal files were repaired for reliable startup.

updates.title: Full gazette tariff lists — every item
updates.notes: Completeness update to the fee tariffs. The High Court and Magistrate work-done dropdowns now contain every line item exactly as published in the 2025 gazettes, including the Sec 65/72/74 additional-costs disbursement and tracing lines, collection-commission percentages, the reserved slots (High Court D-04, Magistrate IV-25), Part I-05, and the counsel travelling-time line. High Court 33 items; Magistrate 148 items. Descriptions re-transcribed to match the gazette. All rates, caps and minimums editable under Settings.

updates.title: Complete court tariffs & Bill of Costs polish
updates.notes: The work-done dropdowns now contain every line item from the 2025 gazettes. High Court (Notice 52750): full sections A-F including Bill-of-Costs and taxation percentages. Magistrate (Notice 53149): full Table A Parts I-IV and Table B Parts I-III (Sec 65/72/74). Percentage items calculate from a base with min/max caps; reference-only items accept a manual amount; all items editable under Settings. Bill of Costs prints the gazette citation line, and the firm logo is larger on all documents.

updates.title: Court matters, tariffs & Bill of Costs
updates.notes: Major update for litigation billing. Create matters as High Court, Magistrate/Regional Court or Miscellaneous, each with an automatic firm reference and a court case-number field. Editable High Court and Magistrate fee-tariff tables under Settings. Fee notes take hours and minutes with a tariff work-done dropdown, plus per-line dates. Generate a full Bill of Costs per matter or a single invoice per fee note.

updates.title: Smarter first-time setup
updates.notes: Setup now asks whether this is your firm's first installation or a secondary device. First install runs the full flow; a secondary device connects to the existing firm database and goes straight to sign-in. Administrators create staff accounts with a temporary password that each user can change under My account.

updates.title: Modern UI/UX refresh
updates.notes: Complete visual refresh to modern standards with a refined design system, glass-blur header and tab bar, animated login, elevated cards, and smoother interactions.

updates.title: Print preview + real email sending
updates.notes: Print shows a full-screen PDF preview before printing. Email/Send delivers the document as a PDF attachment via your SMTP server, configured under Settings.

updates.title: New login page design
updates.notes: Redesigned login screen with animated glow, floating card, gold accent, logo header and password show/hide toggle.

updates.title: Print fix, Share sheet & Login freeze fix
updates.notes: Print works without pop-up permissions. Send/Share opens a full share sheet. Login no longer freezes on slow connections.

updates.title: Premium UI redesign
updates.notes: Redesigned interface with richer shadows, gradient header, gold-accented sidebar, polished cards, buttons and badges.

updates.title: Premium login redesign & bug fixes
updates.notes: New premium login screen, fixed inactive inputs after logout, update banner above sidebar.
